textByHashes.0c0f588acd512b83acf5636108581577f49330fe: A cock-a-doodle hello to you! Caw!
textByHashes.e56595c83b735337f96d216fc98e52bc87549b21: I speak for Clarence, and he bids you good day.
textByHashes.552aebd72d10ca688b100b4b4cf499d4b51301ee: The rooster you see before you.
textByHashes.1b6eb43d269589ffe5cdb31d0f6bbf75de45a519: I speak for him, he speaks through me, I speak through her. It is not important.
textByHashes.b35304b2ddcea9f247e8c7ae4550994ddad814ff: Yes, you are talking to me.
textByHashes.de130f74afe8a96ba838fc248dcf0104d85090b2: Now I'm lost. Who am I?
textByHashes.59496b493642ae28b121068dac48cee16b0a7ece: A special egg? All eggs are special.
textByHashes.2760a2f2c9e356c41c4f5ac6d87edbea6ea2a8c3: One moment, we shall produce one.
textByHashes.5171615d15ae76c03d459bf6d8542acb67ef61b1: Rooster and lady yes this is true. But there is more than one way to make an egg.
textByHashes.8e5815334b02b2de621f31bd60b8c8fc246532d8: There you go! Produced from my pocket, you see.
textByHashes.423a233ddc9f973dd1870895bdf5e92081a9db3d: What can two do for you?
textByHashes.5724f4128e827896e15c9c5c786434ecad717ab4: You don't have enough space for one of my special eggs. Come back when you do.
textByHashes.c3a6bbd95750356a9a9dbfa58fbe8c9a1ee68489: There you go! Use it wisely!
textByHashes.2170f87f2570e1da1500590f249b3c3ca09bed0b: Ah, hello again, special egg person.
textByHashes.9f799a05693de64ee37d03a3710b9a3384b6dd46: We, that is to say, I, have decided, that you will receive no more special eggs.
textByHashes.7439c122999a4018a86ffb90297083c2ee75b9c0: Oh, you aren't devastated? Tormented by this great denial of eggs?
